meta.name: template-fanout-and-synthesize
meta.description: TEMPLATE (pattern, B + barrier): break a question into aspects, research each in parallel, synthesize one answer. Rename meta.name, then replace every <placeholder>.
meta.whenToUse: Research or analysis too broad for one agent's context — decompose, cover, then merge

steps.does: decompose {question} into <4-8> independent aspects worth investigating separately

body.does: investigate {aspect} in depth: <where to look, what evidence counts>

steps.does: synthesize {notes} into one answer to {question}; flag contradictions between aspects and anything no aspect covered

end.review: <e.g. one coherent answer with per-aspect evidence; contradictions surfaced, not averaged away>
